cnc-electronics.wrapped_text:
CNC Electronics
How electrical power,
deterministic timing, feedback,
and safety turn toolpath commands
into controlled machine motion.
cnc-electronics.wrapped_original_text:
CNC Electronics
How electrical power, deterministic timing, feedback, and safety turn toolpath commands into controlled machine motion.

system-mental-model.wrapped_text:
System Mental Model
Think in four simultaneous paths:
commands tell the machine what to
do, power lets it do work,
feedback says what happened, and
safety limits what is allowed.
system-mental-model.wrapped_original_text:
System Mental Model
Think in four simultaneous paths: commands tell the machine what to do, power lets it do work, feedback says what happened, and safety limits what is allowed.

command-path.wrapped_text:
Command Path
G-code or a higher-level job becomes
coordinated axis motion, then
electrical commands to each drive.
command-path.wrapped_original_text:
Command Path
G-code or a higher-level job becomes coordinated axis motion, then electrical commands to each drive.

planner-to-pulses.wrapped_text:
Planner To Pulses
In a step/dir system, the controller converts
trajectory segments into timed step pulses and
direction states.
planner-to-pulses.wrapped_original_text:
Planner To Pulses
In a step/dir system, the controller converts trajectory segments into timed step pulses and direction states.

planner-to-fieldbus.wrapped_text:
Planner To Fieldbus
In a fieldbus system, the controller sends cyclic
position, velocity, or torque setpoints to
intelligent drives.
planner-to-fieldbus.wrapped_original_text:
Planner To Fieldbus
In a fieldbus system, the controller sends cyclic position, velocity, or torque setpoints to intelligent drives.

power-path.wrapped_text:
Power Path
Energy flows from mains to protection,
supplies, drives, motor windings, and
finally mechanical load.
power-path.wrapped_original_text:
Power Path
Energy flows from mains to protection, supplies, drives, motor windings, and finally mechanical load.

logic-power.wrapped_text:
Logic Power
Controllers, sensors, and opto inputs often need
clean 5 V or 24 V logic power with a stable
reference.
logic-power.wrapped_original_text:
Logic Power
Controllers, sensors, and opto inputs often need clean 5 V or 24 V logic power with a stable reference.

motor-power.wrapped_text:
Motor Power
Drives need a higher-energy supply or DC bus sized
for current, acceleration, braking, and fault energy.
motor-power.wrapped_original_text:
Motor Power
Drives need a higher-energy supply or DC bus sized for current, acceleration, braking, and fault energy.

feedback-path.wrapped_text:
Feedback Path
Feedback closes the gap between commanded
motion and actual motion at the drive,
controller, or measurement layer.
feedback-path.wrapped_original_text:
Feedback Path
Feedback closes the gap between commanded motion and actual motion at the drive, controller, or measurement layer.

drive-feedback.wrapped_text:
Drive Feedback
Closed-loop stepper and servo drives use motor
encoders to regulate current, speed, position, or
stall recovery.
drive-feedback.wrapped_original_text:
Drive Feedback
Closed-loop stepper and servo drives use motor encoders to regulate current, speed, position, or stall recovery.

machine-feedback.wrapped_text:
Machine Feedback
Industrial machines may use linear scales, probes,
temperature sensors, or process sensors to measure
the actual machine or process state.
machine-feedback.wrapped_original_text:
Machine Feedback
Industrial machines may use linear scales, probes, temperature sensors, or process sensors to measure the actual machine or process state.

safety-path.wrapped_text:
Safety Path
Safety is a separate permission system that
can remove torque, stop motion, or block
restart even if the controller software fails.
safety-path.wrapped_original_text:
Safety Path
Safety is a separate permission system that can remove torque, stop motion, or block restart even if the controller software fails.

hardwired-stop.wrapped_text:
Hardwired Stop
Emergency stop chains should not depend only on
firmware, USB, Wi-Fi, or the G-code sender.
hardwired-stop.wrapped_original_text:
Hardwired Stop
Emergency stop chains should not depend only on firmware, USB, Wi-Fi, or the G-code sender.

restart-control.wrapped_text:
Restart Control
After a safety trip or alarm, the machine should
require intentional reset, re-enable, and often
re-homing.
restart-control.wrapped_original_text:
Restart Control
After a safety trip or alarm, the machine should require intentional reset, re-enable, and often re-homing.

running-example.wrapped_text:
Running Example
The example machine uses four 3.0 Nm NEMA 23
closed-loop steppers: X, Z, and two
synchronized Y gantry motors driven by encoder
drives from a 6-axis FluidNC controller.
running-example.wrapped_original_text:
Running Example
The example machine uses four 3.0 Nm NEMA 23 closed-loop steppers: X, Z, and two synchronized Y gantry motors driven by encoder drives from a 6-axis FluidNC controller.

controller-layer.wrapped_text:
Controller Layer
The controller owns the
machine-level intent: coordinate
systems, trajectory planning,
timing, I/O logic, alarms, homing,
probing, and job execution.
controller-layer.wrapped_original_text:
Controller Layer
The controller owns the machine-level intent: coordinate systems, trajectory planning, timing, I/O logic, alarms, homing, probing, and job execution.

controller-core-job.wrapped_text:
Controller Core Job
A CNC controller interprets commands,
plans coordinated motion, emits drive
commands, watches inputs, and enforces
machine state.
controller-core-job.wrapped_original_text:
Controller Core Job
A CNC controller interprets commands, plans coordinated motion, emits drive commands, watches inputs, and enforces machine state.

interpreter.wrapped_text:
Interpreter
Parses G-code, modal state, units, work offsets, feed
modes, spindle commands, coolant commands, and
program flow.
interpreter.wrapped_original_text:
Interpreter
Parses G-code, modal state, units, work offsets, feed modes, spindle commands, coolant commands, and program flow.

trajectory-planner.wrapped_text:
Trajectory Planner
Turns geometry into time-based motion while
respecting acceleration, jerk, feed limits, corner
blending, and axis constraints.
trajectory-planner.wrapped_original_text:
Trajectory Planner
Turns geometry into time-based motion while respecting acceleration, jerk, feed limits, corner blending, and axis constraints.

real-time-scheduler.wrapped_text:
Real-Time Scheduler
Generates motion updates at predictable times so axes
stay synchronized instead of receiving uneven
commands.
real-time-scheduler.wrapped_original_text:
Real-Time Scheduler
Generates motion updates at predictable times so axes stay synchronized instead of receiving uneven commands.

controller-state-machine.wrapped_text:
State Machine
Tracks idle, cycle, hold, homing, alarm, reset, and
safety states so outputs match machine condition.
controller-state-machine.wrapped_original_text:
State Machine
Tracks idle, cycle, hold, homing, alarm, reset, and safety states so outputs match machine condition.

controller-categories.wrapped_text:
Controller Categories
Main CNC controller categories differ by where
motion timing, I/O logic, user interface, and
safety integration live.
controller-categories.wrapped_original_text:
Controller Categories
Main CNC controller categories differ by where motion timing, I/O logic, user interface, and safety integration live.

embedded-step-dir.wrapped_text:
Embedded Step-Dir
Firmware controllers such as FluidNC are compact and
practical for routers, lasers, plasma tables, and
small machines that use step/dir drives.
embedded-step-dir.wrapped_original_text:
Embedded Step-Dir
Firmware controllers such as FluidNC are compact and practical for routers, lasers, plasma tables, and small machines that use step/dir drives.

pc-parallel-port.wrapped_text:
PC Parallel Port
Older PC-based controllers generated real-time step
pulses directly from a parallel port, but timing
depends heavily on the host and OS.
pc-parallel-port.wrapped_original_text:
PC Parallel Port
Older PC-based controllers generated real-time step pulses directly from a parallel port, but timing depends heavily on the host and OS.

external-motion-card.wrapped_text:
External Motion Card
A PC user interface can delegate real-time motion to
an Ethernet, USB, or PCI motion card that owns pulse
timing or fieldbus cycles.
external-motion-card.wrapped_original_text:
External Motion Card
A PC user interface can delegate real-time motion to an Ethernet, USB, or PCI motion card that owns pulse timing or fieldbus cycles.

industrial-cnc.wrapped_text:
Industrial CNC
Fanuc, Siemens, Heidenhain, Mitsubishi, and similar
CNCs integrate high-performance motion, drives, I/O,
safety, diagnostics, and metrology workflows.
industrial-cnc.wrapped_original_text:
Industrial CNC
Fanuc, Siemens, Heidenhain, Mitsubishi, and similar CNCs integrate high-performance motion, drives, I/O, safety, diagnostics, and metrology workflows.

plc-motion-control.wrapped_text:
PLC Motion Control
Industrial automation platforms use PLCopen-style
function blocks, EtherCAT or Profinet motion, and
safety PLCs for machines that blend CNC and
automation.
plc-motion-control.wrapped_original_text:
PLC Motion Control
Industrial automation platforms use PLCopen-style function blocks, EtherCAT or Profinet motion, and safety PLCs for machines that blend CNC and automation.

robot-controller.wrapped_text:
Robot Controller
Robotics controllers solve multi-axis kinematics,
coordinated servo loops, safe zones, and
teach-pendant workflows rather than pure Cartesian
G-code motion.
robot-controller.wrapped_original_text:
Robot Controller
Robotics controllers solve multi-axis kinematics, coordinated servo loops, safe zones, and teach-pendant workflows rather than pure Cartesian G-code motion.

fluidnc-controller.wrapped_text:
FluidNC Controller
In the example, FluidNC is the 6-axis motion
controller that maps axes to motor outputs and
sends step, direction, and enable signals to
external closed-loop stepper drives.
fluidnc-controller.wrapped_original_text:
FluidNC Controller
In the example, FluidNC is the 6-axis motion controller that maps axes to motor outputs and sends step, direction, and enable signals to external closed-loop stepper drives.

six-axis-capacity.wrapped_text:
Six Axis Capacity
The six motion channels can cover X, dual Y motors,
Z, and still leave channels for rotary, tangential,
or future machine expansion.
six-axis-capacity.wrapped_original_text:
Six Axis Capacity
The six motion channels can cover X, dual Y motors, Z, and still leave channels for rotary, tangential, or future machine expansion.

grbl-style-workflow.wrapped_text:
Grbl-Style Workflow
FluidNC keeps the familiar sender, G-code,
alarm, homing, and work-coordinate workflow
while moving configuration into machine-readable
files.
grbl-style-workflow.wrapped_original_text:
Grbl-Style Workflow
FluidNC keeps the familiar sender, G-code, alarm, homing, and work-coordinate workflow while moving configuration into machine-readable files.

controller-limits.wrapped_text:
Controller Limits
FluidNC is not a safety PLC or a high-end
fieldbus servo CNC; safety and high-power
fault handling need external rated hardware.
controller-limits.wrapped_original_text:
Controller Limits
FluidNC is not a safety PLC or a high-end fieldbus servo CNC; safety and high-power fault handling need external rated hardware.

example-axis-mapping.wrapped_text:
Example Axis Mapping
Map one motor to X, one motor to Z, and
two motors to Y so the gantry can square
during homing and move as one coordinated
Y axis during cutting.
example-axis-mapping.wrapped_original_text:
Example Axis Mapping
Map one motor to X, one motor to Z, and two motors to Y so the gantry can square during homing and move as one coordinated Y axis during cutting.

x-axis-channel.wrapped_text:
X Axis Channel
The X motor output commands the bridge or
carriage left-right depending on the mechanical
layout.
x-axis-channel.wrapped_original_text:
X Axis Channel
The X motor output commands the bridge or carriage left-right depending on the mechanical layout.

z-axis-channel.wrapped_text:
Z Axis Channel
The Z motor output commands tool height and needs
conservative acceleration because crashes and gravity
effects are concentrated here.
z-axis-channel.wrapped_original_text:
Z Axis Channel
The Z motor output commands tool height and needs conservative acceleration because crashes and gravity effects are concentrated here.

y-left-channel.wrapped_text:
Y Left Channel
One Y motor drives one side of the gantry and should
have its own drive, encoder loop, and homing
reference.
y-left-channel.wrapped_original_text:
Y Left Channel
One Y motor drives one side of the gantry and should have its own drive, encoder loop, and homing reference.

y-right-channel.wrapped_text:
Y Right Channel
The second Y motor drives the other side of the
gantry and must be configured to match direction,
steps per unit, current, and homing behavior.
y-right-channel.wrapped_original_text:
Y Right Channel
The second Y motor drives the other side of the gantry and must be configured to match direction, steps per unit, current, and homing behavior.

drive-layer.wrapped_text:
Drive Layer
The drive is the power electronics
and control layer between
low-energy commands and
high-energy motor windings.
drive-layer.wrapped_original_text:
Drive Layer
The drive is the power electronics and control layer between low-energy commands and high-energy motor windings.

drive-core-job.wrapped_text:
Drive Core Job
A motor driver or drive translates
controller commands into controlled voltage
and current while protecting itself, the
motor, and sometimes the load.
drive-core-job.wrapped_original_text:
Drive Core Job
A motor driver or drive translates controller commands into controlled voltage and current while protecting itself, the motor, and sometimes the load.

command-interface.wrapped_text:
Command Interface
The drive accepts step/dir, analog velocity, PWM,
serial commands, or cyclic fieldbus setpoints
depending on the control architecture.
command-interface.wrapped_original_text:
Command Interface
The drive accepts step/dir, analog velocity, PWM, serial commands, or cyclic fieldbus setpoints depending on the control architecture.

power-conversion.wrapped_text:
Power Conversion
Switching transistors chop the DC bus into motor
phase currents with fast current regulation and
thermal protection.
power-conversion.wrapped_original_text:
Power Conversion
Switching transistors chop the DC bus into motor phase currents with fast current regulation and thermal protection.

loop-ownership.wrapped_text:
Loop Ownership
The drive may own only current control, or it may
also own velocity and position loops in servo and
closed-loop stepper systems.
loop-ownership.wrapped_original_text:
Loop Ownership
The drive may own only current control, or it may also own velocity and position loops in servo and closed-loop stepper systems.

fault-boundary.wrapped_text:
Fault Boundary
Drives detect overcurrent, overvoltage, undervoltage,
overtemperature, encoder faults, following error, and
stall conditions before damage grows.
fault-boundary.wrapped_original_text:
Fault Boundary
Drives detect overcurrent, overvoltage, undervoltage, overtemperature, encoder faults, following error, and stall conditions before damage grows.

drive-families.wrapped_text:
Drive Families
Motor drive categories are best understood
by motor physics, feedback depth, and
command interface.
drive-families.wrapped_original_text:
Drive Families
Motor drive categories are best understood by motor physics, feedback depth, and command interface.

open-loop-stepper-driver.wrapped_text:
Open-Loop Stepper Driver
Regulates phase current according to commanded steps
but does not know whether the rotor actually
followed.
open-loop-stepper-driver.wrapped_original_text:
Open-Loop Stepper Driver
Regulates phase current according to commanded steps but does not know whether the rotor actually followed.

closed-loop-stepper-drive.wrapped_text:
Closed-Loop Stepper Drive
Uses an encoder to compare commanded and actual rotor
position, improving stall detection, torque use, and
alarm behavior.
closed-loop-stepper-drive.wrapped_original_text:
Closed-Loop Stepper Drive
Uses an encoder to compare commanded and actual rotor position, improving stall detection, torque use, and alarm behavior.

servo-drive.wrapped_text:
Servo Drive
Controls a servo motor with current, velocity,
and position loops, usually with encoder feedback
and higher dynamic bandwidth.
servo-drive.wrapped_original_text:
Servo Drive
Controls a servo motor with current, velocity, and position loops, usually with encoder feedback and higher dynamic bandwidth.

vfd-spindle-drive.wrapped_text:
VFD Spindle Drive
Controls an induction or synchronous spindle motor by
varying frequency, voltage, and sometimes vector
current for speed and torque.
vfd-spindle-drive.wrapped_original_text:
VFD Spindle Drive
Controls an induction or synchronous spindle motor by varying frequency, voltage, and sometimes vector current for speed and torque.

linear-motor-drive.wrapped_text:
Linear Motor Drive
Controls a direct-drive linear motor where stiffness,
thermal growth, and scale feedback matter more than
screw backlash.
linear-motor-drive.wrapped_original_text:
Linear Motor Drive
Controls a direct-drive linear motor where stiffness, thermal growth, and scale feedback matter more than screw backlash.

process-power-drive.wrapped_text:
Process Power Drive
Plasma, laser, EDM, waterjet, and additive systems
add process power supplies whose control loops
interact with motion.
process-power-drive.wrapped_original_text:
Process Power Drive
Plasma, laser, EDM, waterjet, and additive systems add process power supplies whose control loops interact with motion.

stepper-driver-duties.wrapped_text:
Stepper Driver Duties
A stepper driver is responsible for
current control, microstepping, timing
acceptance, protection, and clear fault
signaling.
stepper-driver-duties.wrapped_original_text:
Stepper Driver Duties
A stepper driver is responsible for current control, microstepping, timing acceptance, protection, and clear fault signaling.

step-translation.wrapped_text:
Step Translation
Each step pulse advances the commanded electrical
angle by one microstep while direction selects sign.
step-translation.wrapped_original_text:
Step Translation
Each step pulse advances the commanded electrical angle by one microstep while direction selects sign.

microstepping.wrapped_text:
Microstepping
Microstepping shapes sine-like phase currents to
reduce vibration and resonance, but it does not create
full-step torque at every microstep.
microstepping.wrapped_original_text:
Microstepping
Microstepping shapes sine-like phase currents to reduce vibration and resonance, but it does not create full-step torque at every microstep.

current-regulation.wrapped_text:
Current Regulation
Chopper current control limits winding current
despite changing inductance, speed, bus voltage, and
back EMF.
current-regulation.wrapped_original_text:
Current Regulation
Chopper current control limits winding current despite changing inductance, speed, bus voltage, and back EMF.

decay-mode.wrapped_text:
Decay Mode
Fast, slow, and mixed decay settings affect current
ripple, torque smoothness, heat, and high-speed
behavior.
decay-mode.wrapped_original_text:
Decay Mode
Fast, slow, and mixed decay settings affect current ripple, torque smoothness, heat, and high-speed behavior.

timing-requirements.wrapped_text:
Timing Requirements
The controller must meet drive requirements for step
pulse width, direction setup time, enable timing, and
opto input current.
timing-requirements.wrapped_original_text:
Timing Requirements
The controller must meet drive requirements for step pulse width, direction setup time, enable timing, and opto input current.

protection-functions.wrapped_text:
Protection Functions
Good drivers protect against overcurrent, short
circuit, overtemperature, supply faults, and encoder
mismatch where applicable.
protection-functions.wrapped_original_text:
Protection Functions
Good drivers protect against overcurrent, short circuit, overtemperature, supply faults, and encoder mismatch where applicable.

alarm-output.wrapped_text:
Alarm Output
Closed-loop drives should expose a fault output so
the controller or safety logic can stop coordinated
motion when one axis fails.
alarm-output.wrapped_original_text:
Alarm Output
Closed-loop drives should expose a fault output so the controller or safety logic can stop coordinated motion when one axis fails.

motor-phase-current.wrapped_text:
Motor Phase Current
Torque comes from controlled winding
current, not from the step pulse itself; the
pulse is only a command.
motor-phase-current.wrapped_original_text:
Motor Phase Current
Torque comes from controlled winding current, not from the step pulse itself; the pulse is only a command.

inductance-limit.wrapped_text:
Inductance Limit
Stepper windings resist rapid current change, so high
speed requires enough bus voltage and a driver that
can force current quickly.
inductance-limit.wrapped_original_text:
Inductance Limit
Stepper windings resist rapid current change, so high speed requires enough bus voltage and a driver that can force current quickly.

back-emf.wrapped_text:
Back EMF
As speed rises, the motor generates voltage opposing
the drive, reducing available current and torque
margin.
back-emf.wrapped_original_text:
Back EMF
As speed rises, the motor generates voltage opposing the drive, reducing available current and torque margin.

heat-budget.wrapped_text:
Heat Budget
Motor current, drive losses, enclosure temperature,
and duty cycle determine safe continuous operation
more than holding torque alone.
heat-budget.wrapped_original_text:
Heat Budget
Motor current, drive losses, enclosure temperature, and duty cycle determine safe continuous operation more than holding torque alone.

motors-and-feedback.wrapped_text:
Motors And Feedback
Motors create force, feedback
observes motion, and the chosen
loop structure determines
accuracy, stiffness, bandwidth,
and fault behavior.
motors-and-feedback.wrapped_original_text:
Motors And Feedback
Motors create force, feedback observes motion, and the chosen loop structure determines accuracy, stiffness, bandwidth, and fault behavior.

open-vs-closed-loop.wrapped_text:
Open vs Closed Loop
Open-loop systems trust the command;
closed-loop systems compare command
to measurement and react.
open-vs-closed-loop.wrapped_original_text:
Open vs Closed Loop
Open-loop systems trust the command; closed-loop systems compare command to measurement and react.

open-loop-steppers.wrapped_text:
Open-Loop Steppers
Open-loop steppers are simple and
deterministic when torque margin is high, but
missed steps can go unnoticed until the part
or machine reveals the error.
open-loop-steppers.wrapped_original_text:
Open-Loop Steppers
Open-loop steppers are simple and deterministic when torque margin is high, but missed steps can go unnoticed until the part or machine reveals the error.

closed-loop-steppers.wrapped_text:
Closed-Loop Steppers
Closed-loop steppers keep stepper mechanics
and step/dir control while adding
encoder-based correction, stall alarms, and
better low-speed behavior.
closed-loop-steppers.wrapped_original_text:
Closed-Loop Steppers
Closed-loop steppers keep stepper mechanics and step/dir control while adding encoder-based correction, stall alarms, and better low-speed behavior.

true-servos.wrapped_text:
True Servos
True servo systems are designed around
continuous feedback control, higher
speeds, better inertia matching, and
tighter following-error management.
true-servos.wrapped_original_text:
True Servos
True servo systems are designed around continuous feedback control, higher speeds, better inertia matching, and tighter following-error management.

feedback-hierarchy.wrapped_text:
Feedback Hierarchy
The feedback sensor should measure the error
you actually care about, as close to the
tool or work as practical.
feedback-hierarchy.wrapped_original_text:
Feedback Hierarchy
The feedback sensor should measure the error you actually care about, as close to the tool or work as practical.

motor-encoder.wrapped_text:
Motor Encoder
Measures motor shaft position and helps the drive
control rotor motion, but it cannot see belt stretch,
screw pitch error, backlash, or frame deflection.
motor-encoder.wrapped_original_text:
Motor Encoder
Measures motor shaft position and helps the drive control rotor motion, but it cannot see belt stretch, screw pitch error, backlash, or frame deflection.

linear-scale.wrapped_text:
Linear Scale
Measures table or axis position directly and can
close the loop around screw error, thermal drift, and
compliance.
linear-scale.wrapped_original_text:
Linear Scale
Measures table or axis position directly and can close the loop around screw error, thermal drift, and compliance.

spindle-encoder.wrapped_text:
Spindle Encoder
Supports rigid tapping, threading, orientation, speed
verification, and process synchronization.
spindle-encoder.wrapped_original_text:
Spindle Encoder
Supports rigid tapping, threading, orientation, speed verification, and process synchronization.

probe-and-tool-setter.wrapped_text:
Probe And Tool Setter
Touch probes and tool setters connect electronics to
metrology so work offsets, tool lengths, and
inspection data become part of the control loop.
probe-and-tool-setter.wrapped_original_text:
Probe And Tool Setter
Touch probes and tool setters connect electronics to metrology so work offsets, tool lengths, and inspection data become part of the control loop.

following-error.wrapped_text:
Following Error
Following error is the difference between
commanded and actual position; high-end
systems treat it as a diagnostic, tuning
signal, and safety clue.
following-error.wrapped_original_text:
Following Error
Following error is the difference between commanded and actual position; high-end systems treat it as a diagnostic, tuning signal, and safety clue.

error-window.wrapped_text:
Error Window
The allowed error must be wide enough for
acceleration transients and tight enough to detect
stalls, crashes, and tuning problems.
error-window.wrapped_original_text:
Error Window
The allowed error must be wide enough for acceleration transients and tight enough to detect stalls, crashes, and tuning problems.

tuning-tradeoff.wrapped_text:
Tuning Tradeoff
Higher gains improve stiffness but can excite
resonance, amplify noise, and overload
mechanical components.
tuning-tradeoff.wrapped_original_text:
Tuning Tradeoff
Higher gains improve stiffness but can excite resonance, amplify noise, and overload mechanical components.

mechanical-compliance.wrapped_text:
Mechanical Compliance
Belts, couplers, screws, bearings, frames, and tool
deflection can dominate accuracy even when motor
feedback looks perfect.
mechanical-compliance.wrapped_original_text:
Mechanical Compliance
Belts, couplers, screws, bearings, frames, and tool deflection can dominate accuracy even when motor feedback looks perfect.

dual-y-gantry.wrapped_text:
Dual Y Gantry
The example machine uses two closed-loop Y
motors because a wide gantry needs torque on
both sides and must avoid racking.
dual-y-gantry.wrapped_original_text:
Dual Y Gantry
The example machine uses two closed-loop Y motors because a wide gantry needs torque on both sides and must avoid racking.

matched-drive-setup.wrapped_text:
Matched Drive Setup
Both Y drives should match current limit, microstep
setting, pulse timing, encoder direction,
acceleration, and fault behavior.
matched-drive-setup.wrapped_original_text:
Matched Drive Setup
Both Y drives should match current limit, microstep setting, pulse timing, encoder direction, acceleration, and fault behavior.

squaring-homing.wrapped_text:
Squaring Homing
Independent Y home switches allow each side to
reference separately before coordinated cutting,
reducing gantry skew.
squaring-homing.wrapped_original_text:
Squaring Homing
Independent Y home switches allow each side to reference separately before coordinated cutting, reducing gantry skew.

gantry-fault-case.wrapped_text:
Gantry Fault Case
If one Y drive faults while the other
continues, the gantry can rack hard; fault
outputs should stop all coordinated
motion.
gantry-fault-case.wrapped_original_text:
Gantry Fault Case
If one Y drive faults while the other continues, the gantry can rack hard; fault outputs should stop all coordinated motion.

power-and-noise.wrapped_text:
Power And Noise
Power quality, grounding,
shielding, and physical wiring
decide whether a CNC cabinet
behaves like an instrument or like
a noise antenna.
power-and-noise.wrapped_original_text:
Power And Noise
Power quality, grounding, shielding, and physical wiring decide whether a CNC cabinet behaves like an instrument or like a noise antenna.

power-supplies.wrapped_text:
Power Supplies
Separate supply roles make troubleshooting
easier: motor bus power, logic power, sensor
power, brake power, and process power should
be planned intentionally.
power-supplies.wrapped_original_text:
Power Supplies
Separate supply roles make troubleshooting easier: motor bus power, logic power, sensor power, brake power, and process power should be planned intentionally.

motor-supply-sizing.wrapped_text:
Motor Supply Sizing
Size voltage for speed and current response, current
for simultaneous axis load, and reserves for
acceleration and heating.
motor-supply-sizing.wrapped_original_text:
Motor Supply Sizing
Size voltage for speed and current response, current for simultaneous axis load, and reserves for acceleration and heating.

twenty-four-volt-controls.wrapped_text:
24 V Controls
Industrial sensors, relays, contactors, and safety
devices usually prefer 24 V control power because it
is robust over cabinet distances.
twenty-four-volt-controls.wrapped_original_text:
24 V Controls
Industrial sensors, relays, contactors, and safety devices usually prefer 24 V control power because it is robust over cabinet distances.

five-volt-interfaces.wrapped_text:
5 V Interfaces
Many stepper drive opto inputs expect 5 V signaling,
so verify that the controller output and drive input
current are compatible.
five-volt-interfaces.wrapped_original_text:
5 V Interfaces
Many stepper drive opto inputs expect 5 V signaling, so verify that the controller output and drive input current are compatible.

braking-energy.wrapped_text:
Braking Energy
Decelerating axes and spindles return energy to the
DC bus, which may require braking resistors,
regenerative drives, or conservative decel limits.
braking-energy.wrapped_original_text:
Braking Energy
Decelerating axes and spindles return energy to the DC bus, which may require braking resistors, regenerative drives, or conservative decel limits.

cabinet-power-chain.wrapped_text:
Cabinet Power Chain
The cabinet should have a legible chain from
mains entry to disconnect, fusing,
filtering, contactors, supplies, drives, and
loads.
cabinet-power-chain.wrapped_original_text:
Cabinet Power Chain
The cabinet should have a legible chain from mains entry to disconnect, fusing, filtering, contactors, supplies, drives, and loads.

mains-disconnect.wrapped_text:
Mains Disconnect
A lockable disconnect and branch protection define the
maintenance boundary before internal power
distribution begins.
mains-disconnect.wrapped_original_text:
Mains Disconnect
A lockable disconnect and branch protection define the maintenance boundary before internal power distribution begins.

circuit-protection.wrapped_text:
Circuit Protection
Fuses, breakers, and electronic protection should be
sized for wire ampacity, supply limits, and
fault-clearing behavior.
circuit-protection.wrapped_original_text:
Circuit Protection
Fuses, breakers, and electronic protection should be sized for wire ampacity, supply limits, and fault-clearing behavior.

contactor-strategy.wrapped_text:
Contactor Strategy
Contactors can remove drive or spindle power, but
drive-integrated safety such as STO is often a
cleaner motion-safety mechanism.
contactor-strategy.wrapped_original_text:
Contactor Strategy
Contactors can remove drive or spindle power, but drive-integrated safety such as STO is often a cleaner motion-safety mechanism.

grounding-and-bonding.wrapped_text:
Grounding And Bonding
Grounding is for fault current and reference
stability; shielding is for noise control;
mixing those mental models causes cabinet
problems.
grounding-and-bonding.wrapped_original_text:
Grounding And Bonding
Grounding is for fault current and reference stability; shielding is for noise control; mixing those mental models causes cabinet problems.

protective-earth.wrapped_text:
Protective Earth
Bond metal enclosures, machine frame, motor
cases, cable shields, and exposed conductive
parts to protective earth for fault safety.
protective-earth.wrapped_original_text:
Protective Earth
Bond metal enclosures, machine frame, motor cases, cable shields, and exposed conductive parts to protective earth for fault safety.

signal-reference.wrapped_text:
Signal Reference
Logic common is a circuit reference, not a substitute
for protective earth; decide where references connect
and avoid accidental loops.
signal-reference.wrapped_original_text:
Signal Reference
Logic common is a circuit reference, not a substitute for protective earth; decide where references connect and avoid accidental loops.

star-vs-plane.wrapped_text:
Star Vs Plane
Small machines often use star-like returns, while
industrial cabinets use bonded metal backplanes and
short low-impedance connections.
star-vs-plane.wrapped_original_text:
Star Vs Plane
Small machines often use star-like returns, while industrial cabinets use bonded metal backplanes and short low-impedance connections.

shielding-and-routing.wrapped_text:
Shielding And Routing
Route high-energy switching cables away from
low-level signals, and terminate shields
deliberately instead of leaving them
decorative.
shielding-and-routing.wrapped_original_text:
Shielding And Routing
Route high-energy switching cables away from low-level signals, and terminate shields deliberately instead of leaving them decorative.

motor-cables.wrapped_text:
Motor Cables
Motor phase cables carry fast switching currents and
should be shielded, mechanically protected, and
separated from encoder and sensor wiring.
motor-cables.wrapped_original_text:
Motor Cables
Motor phase cables carry fast switching currents and should be shielded, mechanically protected, and separated from encoder and sensor wiring.

encoder-cables.wrapped_text:
Encoder Cables
Encoder wiring needs twisted pairs, shield
continuity, correct termination, and separation from
VFD, plasma, laser, and motor power wiring.
encoder-cables.wrapped_original_text:
Encoder Cables
Encoder wiring needs twisted pairs, shield continuity, correct termination, and separation from VFD, plasma, laser, and motor power wiring.

vfd-cables.wrapped_text:
VFD Cables
Spindle VFD output cables are a major EMI source and
should use VFD-rated shielded cable, proper shield
termination, and routing discipline.
vfd-cables.wrapped_original_text:
VFD Cables
Spindle VFD output cables are a major EMI source and should use VFD-rated shielded cable, proper shield termination, and routing discipline.

ferrites-and-filters.wrapped_text:
Ferrites And Filters
Filters, ferrites, snubbers, and surge suppressors
solve specific noise paths; they do not replace good
layout and bonding.
ferrites-and-filters.wrapped_original_text:
Ferrites And Filters
Filters, ferrites, snubbers, and surge suppressors solve specific noise paths; they do not replace good layout and bonding.

signal-integrity.wrapped_text:
Signal Integrity
Signal integrity means the receiver sees the
intended timing, voltage, polarity, and edge
quality after the real cable, connectors,
noise, and grounding are included.
signal-integrity.wrapped_original_text:
Signal Integrity
Signal integrity means the receiver sees the intended timing, voltage, polarity, and edge quality after the real cable, connectors, noise, and grounding are included.

pulse-shape.wrapped_text:
Pulse Shape
Long cables, weak drivers, opto inputs, and
capacitance can stretch edges enough to create missed
or extra steps.
pulse-shape.wrapped_original_text:
Pulse Shape
Long cables, weak drivers, opto inputs, and capacitance can stretch edges enough to create missed or extra steps.

common-mode-range.wrapped_text:
Common-Mode Range
Differential interfaces still fail if the voltage
between device grounds exceeds the receiver
common-mode limit.
common-mode-range.wrapped_original_text:
Common-Mode Range
Differential interfaces still fail if the voltage between device grounds exceeds the receiver common-mode limit.

noise-immunity.wrapped_text:
Noise Immunity
Noise immunity is engineered by lowering
source emissions, reducing coupling paths, and
increasing receiver tolerance.
noise-immunity.wrapped_original_text:
Noise Immunity
Noise immunity is engineered by lowering source emissions, reducing coupling paths, and increasing receiver tolerance.

differential-signals.wrapped_text:
Differential Signals
RS-485, encoder differential pairs, and
industrial fieldbuses reject common-mode noise
better than single-ended cabinet wiring.
differential-signals.wrapped_original_text:
Differential Signals
RS-485, encoder differential pairs, and industrial fieldbuses reject common-mode noise better than single-ended cabinet wiring.

opto-isolation.wrapped_text:
Opto Isolation
Opto-isolated inputs reduce damage and ground-noise
coupling, but still need enough input current and
correct polarity.
opto-isolation.wrapped_original_text:
Opto Isolation
Opto-isolated inputs reduce damage and ground-noise coupling, but still need enough input current and correct polarity.

debounce-filtering.wrapped_text:
Debounce And Filtering
Limit switches, probes, and E-stop feedback need
hardware and software filtering chosen so noise is
ignored but real events are not delayed dangerously.
debounce-filtering.wrapped_original_text:
Debounce And Filtering
Limit switches, probes, and E-stop feedback need hardware and software filtering chosen so noise is ignored but real events are not delayed dangerously.

example-wiring-priorities.wrapped_text:
Example Wiring Priorities
For the FluidNC closed-loop stepper example,
verify 5 V step/dir compatibility, bring every
drive alarm into the controller or safety
chain, and keep encoder and motor cables
separated.
example-wiring-priorities.wrapped_original_text:
Example Wiring Priorities
For the FluidNC closed-loop stepper example, verify 5 V step/dir compatibility, bring every drive alarm into the controller or safety chain, and keep encoder and motor cables separated.

io-and-safety.wrapped_text:
I/O And Safety
Machine I/O tells the controller
what the machine is allowed to do,
while safety-rated hardware
decides what the machine is
allowed to energize.
io-and-safety.wrapped_original_text:
I/O And Safety
Machine I/O tells the controller what the machine is allowed to do, while safety-rated hardware decides what the machine is allowed to energize.

io-core-job.wrapped_text:
I/O Core Job
I/O connects abstract controller states to
real devices: switches, probes, relays,
valves, spindles, pumps, lasers, torches,
brakes, and alarms.
io-core-job.wrapped_original_text:
I/O Core Job
I/O connects abstract controller states to real devices: switches, probes, relays, valves, spindles, pumps, lasers, torches, brakes, and alarms.

inputs.wrapped_text:
Inputs
Inputs include limits, homes, probes, door
interlocks, pressure switches, arc-ok, coolant flow,
drive-ready, and drive-alarm signals.
inputs.wrapped_original_text:
Inputs
Inputs include limits, homes, probes, door interlocks, pressure switches, arc-ok, coolant flow, drive-ready, and drive-alarm signals.

outputs.wrapped_text:
Outputs
Outputs include enables, spindle commands, coolant,
mist, air blast, solenoids, brakes, lamps, process
start, and alarm indicators.
outputs.wrapped_original_text:
Outputs
Outputs include enables, spindle commands, coolant, mist, air blast, solenoids, brakes, lamps, process start, and alarm indicators.

input-polarity.wrapped_text:
Input Polarity
Normally-closed circuits are often preferred for
critical signals because broken wires become visible
faults.
input-polarity.wrapped_original_text:
Input Polarity
Normally-closed circuits are often preferred for critical signals because broken wires become visible faults.

limits-and-homing.wrapped_text:
Limits And Homing
Limits prevent travel beyond safe
boundaries; homing establishes a repeatable
machine coordinate reference.
limits-and-homing.wrapped_original_text:
Limits And Homing
Limits prevent travel beyond safe boundaries; homing establishes a repeatable machine coordinate reference.

limit-switches.wrapped_text:
Limit Switches
Limit switches are last-resort travel boundaries and
should stop motion before mechanics hit hard stops.
limit-switches.wrapped_original_text:
Limit Switches
Limit switches are last-resort travel boundaries and should stop motion before mechanics hit hard stops.

home-switches.wrapped_text:
Home Switches
Home switches are reference sensors and should be
repeatable, protected, and placed where homing motion
is mechanically safe.
home-switches.wrapped_original_text:
Home Switches
Home switches are reference sensors and should be repeatable, protected, and placed where homing motion is mechanically safe.

soft-limits.wrapped_text:
Soft Limits
Soft limits use the known machine coordinate system
to prevent commands outside the valid work envelope.
soft-limits.wrapped_original_text:
Soft Limits
Soft limits use the known machine coordinate system to prevent commands outside the valid work envelope.

hard-limits.wrapped_text:
Hard Limits
Hard limits watch physical inputs during motion and
put the controller into alarm when a boundary switch
trips.
hard-limits.wrapped_original_text:
Hard Limits
Hard limits watch physical inputs during motion and put the controller into alarm when a boundary switch trips.

homing-strategy.wrapped_text:
Homing Strategy
The example should home X, Z, and both Y sides
in a sequence that avoids collisions, squares
the gantry, and leaves a known machine zero.
homing-strategy.wrapped_original_text:
Homing Strategy
The example should home X, Z, and both Y sides in a sequence that avoids collisions, squares the gantry, and leaves a known machine zero.

pull-off-distance.wrapped_text:
Pull-Off Distance
After switch contact, the axis backs off enough
to clear the sensor and establish a stable
post-home state.
pull-off-distance.wrapped_original_text:
Pull-Off Distance
After switch contact, the axis backs off enough to clear the sensor and establish a stable post-home state.

search-and-latch.wrapped_text:
Search And Latch
A faster search move finds the switch, then a slower
latch move improves repeatability.
search-and-latch.wrapped_original_text:
Search And Latch
A faster search move finds the switch, then a slower latch move improves repeatability.

dual-y-switches.wrapped_text:
Dual-Y Switches
Two independent Y home switches let the controller
correct gantry skew before treating both Y motors as
a synchronized axis.
dual-y-switches.wrapped_original_text:
Dual-Y Switches
Two independent Y home switches let the controller correct gantry skew before treating both Y motors as a synchronized axis.

alarm-chain.wrapped_text:
Alarm Chain
Alarms should propagate from drives and
process devices to the controller state
machine and, for hazardous cases, to safety
hardware.
alarm-chain.wrapped_original_text:
Alarm Chain
Alarms should propagate from drives and process devices to the controller state machine and, for hazardous cases, to safety hardware.

drive-alarm-input.wrapped_text:
Drive Alarm Input
Each closed-loop stepper drive should expose alarm or
fault status so a stall or encoder fault cannot be
hidden.
drive-alarm-input.wrapped_original_text:
Drive Alarm Input
Each closed-loop stepper drive should expose alarm or fault status so a stall or encoder fault cannot be hidden.

controller-alarm-state.wrapped_text:
Controller Alarm State
Controller alarm state blocks further motion until
the cause is understood and the operator
intentionally clears it.
controller-alarm-state.wrapped_original_text:
Controller Alarm State
Controller alarm state blocks further motion until the cause is understood and the operator intentionally clears it.

diagnostic-labels.wrapped_text:
Diagnostic Labels
Wire labels, terminal numbers, LED indicators, and
documented I/O names make faults diagnosable instead
of mysterious.
diagnostic-labels.wrapped_original_text:
Diagnostic Labels
Wire labels, terminal numbers, LED indicators, and documented I/O names make faults diagnosable instead of mysterious.

emergency-stop-chain.wrapped_text:
Emergency Stop Chain
E-stop is a safety function design problem,
not merely an input pin that asks firmware to
pause.
emergency-stop-chain.wrapped_original_text:
Emergency Stop Chain
E-stop is a safety function design problem, not merely an input pin that asks firmware to pause.

stop-category-zero.wrapped_text:
Stop Category 0
Immediate torque removal is simple but may allow
uncontrolled coast, lost position, or falling
vertical loads.
stop-category-zero.wrapped_original_text:
Stop Category 0
Immediate torque removal is simple but may allow uncontrolled coast, lost position, or falling vertical loads.

stop-category-one.wrapped_text:
Stop Category 1
Controlled deceleration followed by torque removal is
often better for high-inertia spindles, gantries, and
vertical axes.
stop-category-one.wrapped_original_text:
Stop Category 1
Controlled deceleration followed by torque removal is often better for high-inertia spindles, gantries, and vertical axes.

reset-discipline.wrapped_text:
Reset Discipline
Reset should restore permission to restart, not
automatically restart motion or re-energize hazards.
reset-discipline.wrapped_original_text:
Reset Discipline
Reset should restore permission to restart, not automatically restart motion or re-energize hazards.

software-stop-trap.wrapped_text:
Software Stop Trap
A feed hold, pause button, or sender
disconnect is operational control; it is not a
substitute for a rated emergency stop chain.
software-stop-trap.wrapped_original_text:
Software Stop Trap
A feed hold, pause button, or sender disconnect is operational control; it is not a substitute for a rated emergency stop chain.

safety-rated-functions.wrapped_text:
Safety-Rated Functions
Drive-integrated safety functions remove or
limit hazardous motion with defined behavior
and safety performance.
safety-rated-functions.wrapped_original_text:
Safety-Rated Functions
Drive-integrated safety functions remove or limit hazardous motion with defined behavior and safety performance.

sto.wrapped_text:
STO
Safe Torque Off removes drive output torque without
necessarily removing mains power or providing
electrical isolation for maintenance.
sto.wrapped_original_text:
STO
Safe Torque Off removes drive output torque without necessarily removing mains power or providing electrical isolation for maintenance.

ss1.wrapped_text:
SS1
Safe Stop 1 monitors or commands deceleration, then
transitions to STO after the stop condition is met.
ss1.wrapped_original_text:
SS1
Safe Stop 1 monitors or commands deceleration, then transitions to STO after the stop condition is met.

sls.wrapped_text:
SLS
Safely Limited Speed allows controlled motion only
below a verified speed limit, useful for setup, jog,
and guarded access modes.
sls.wrapped_original_text:
SLS
Safely Limited Speed allows controlled motion only below a verified speed limit, useful for setup, jog, and guarded access modes.

sos.wrapped_text:
SOS
Safe Operating Stop monitors standstill while the
drive remains energized, useful where holding position
matters.
sos.wrapped_original_text:
SOS
Safe Operating Stop monitors standstill while the drive remains energized, useful where holding position matters.

industrial-practices.wrapped_text:
Industrial Practices
High-end machines scale the same
ideas with tighter timing, richer
feedback, rated safety,
diagnostics, and metrology tied
into production quality.
industrial-practices.wrapped_original_text:
Industrial Practices
High-end machines scale the same ideas with tighter timing, richer feedback, rated safety, diagnostics, and metrology tied into production quality.

industrial-safety.wrapped_text:
Industrial Safety
Industrial safety starts with risk assessment,
then assigns rated hardware and validation
evidence to each hazard instead of treating
safety as normal control logic.
industrial-safety.wrapped_original_text:
Industrial Safety
Industrial safety starts with risk assessment, then assigns rated hardware and validation evidence to each hazard instead of treating safety as normal control logic.

risk-assessment.wrapped_text:
Risk Assessment
Identify severity, exposure, avoidance possibility,
and required safety performance before choosing
relays, safety PLCs, guard locks, or drive safety
functions.
risk-assessment.wrapped_original_text:
Risk Assessment
Identify severity, exposure, avoidance possibility, and required safety performance before choosing relays, safety PLCs, guard locks, or drive safety functions.

validation-evidence.wrapped_text:
Validation Evidence
Document wiring, fault reaction, reset behavior, stop
time, safety function tests, and maintenance
intervals so the machine remains safe after
commissioning.
validation-evidence.wrapped_original_text:
Validation Evidence
Document wiring, fault reaction, reset behavior, stop time, safety function tests, and maintenance intervals so the machine remains safe after commissioning.

servo-systems.wrapped_text:
Servo Systems
Industrial CNCs favor servos when speed range,
acceleration, stiffness, duty cycle, and
following-error control matter more than
simplicity.
servo-systems.wrapped_original_text:
Servo Systems
Industrial CNCs favor servos when speed range, acceleration, stiffness, duty cycle, and following-error control matter more than simplicity.

current-loop.wrapped_text:
Current Loop
The inner loop regulates motor torque-producing
current and usually runs fastest.
current-loop.wrapped_original_text:
Current Loop
The inner loop regulates motor torque-producing current and usually runs fastest.

velocity-loop.wrapped_text:
Velocity Loop
The velocity loop damps motion and rejects load
disturbances before they become large position
errors.
velocity-loop.wrapped_original_text:
Velocity Loop
The velocity loop damps motion and rejects load disturbances before they become large position errors.

position-loop.wrapped_text:
Position Loop
The position loop tracks commanded trajectory
and manages following error at the axis level.
position-loop.wrapped_original_text:
Position Loop
The position loop tracks commanded trajectory and manages following error at the axis level.

feedforward.wrapped_text:
Feedforward
Velocity, acceleration, friction, and gravity
feedforward reduce error before feedback has to
correct it.
feedforward.wrapped_original_text:
Feedforward
Velocity, acceleration, friction, and gravity feedforward reduce error before feedback has to correct it.

fieldbus-motion.wrapped_text:
Fieldbus Motion
Industrial fieldbus motion moves from pulse
trains to synchronized cyclic data with
drive state, commands, feedback, and
diagnostics in one network.
fieldbus-motion.wrapped_original_text:
Fieldbus Motion
Industrial fieldbus motion moves from pulse trains to synchronized cyclic data with drive state, commands, feedback, and diagnostics in one network.

ethercat.wrapped_text:
EtherCAT
EtherCAT is widely used for high-axis-count
synchronized motion because distributed clocks
can align device timing with sub-microsecond
class precision.
ethercat.wrapped_original_text:
EtherCAT
EtherCAT is widely used for high-axis-count synchronized motion because distributed clocks can align device timing with sub-microsecond class precision.

profinet-irt.wrapped_text:
Profinet IRT
Profinet IRT is common in Siemens-centered automation
where deterministic Ethernet integrates PLC, drives,
I/O, and safety.
profinet-irt.wrapped_original_text:
Profinet IRT
Profinet IRT is common in Siemens-centered automation where deterministic Ethernet integrates PLC, drives, I/O, and safety.

sercos-mechatrolink.wrapped_text:
Sercos And Mechatrolink
Sercos and MECHATROLINK are established motion
networks in machine-tool and servo automation
ecosystems.
sercos-mechatrolink.wrapped_original_text:
Sercos And Mechatrolink
Sercos and MECHATROLINK are established motion networks in machine-tool and servo automation ecosystems.

cia-402-profile.wrapped_text:
CiA 402 Profile
CiA 402 defines common drive behavior such as state
machine, control word, status word, operation modes,
and process data for servo, inverter, and stepper
drives.
cia-402-profile.wrapped_original_text:
CiA 402 Profile
CiA 402 defines common drive behavior such as state machine, control word, status word, operation modes, and process data for servo, inverter, and stepper drives.

deterministic-timing.wrapped_text:
Deterministic Timing
Coordinated motion depends on bounded
latency and jitter because each axis command
must arrive at the right time relative to
all others.
deterministic-timing.wrapped_original_text:
Deterministic Timing
Coordinated motion depends on bounded latency and jitter because each axis command must arrive at the right time relative to all others.

cycle-time.wrapped_text:
Cycle Time
Servo and fieldbus cycles are chosen to match machine
dynamics, drive bandwidth, and required contour
accuracy.
cycle-time.wrapped_original_text:
Cycle Time
Servo and fieldbus cycles are chosen to match machine dynamics, drive bandwidth, and required contour accuracy.

jitter-budget.wrapped_text:
Jitter Budget
Timing jitter becomes path error, velocity noise, or
surface finish error when axes do not update evenly.
jitter-budget.wrapped_original_text:
Jitter Budget
Timing jitter becomes path error, velocity noise, or surface finish error when axes do not update evenly.

timestamped-feedback.wrapped_text:
Timestamped Feedback
High-end systems timestamp I/O and feedback so
measurements can be correlated with motion instead of
guessed afterward.
timestamped-feedback.wrapped_original_text:
Timestamped Feedback
High-end systems timestamp I/O and feedback so measurements can be correlated with motion instead of guessed afterward.

diagnostics.wrapped_text:
Diagnostics
Diagnostics turn faults into evidence: what
failed, when it failed, under what command,
and what the machine did next.
diagnostics.wrapped_original_text:
Diagnostics
Diagnostics turn faults into evidence: what failed, when it failed, under what command, and what the machine did next.

drive-trace.wrapped_text:
Drive Trace
Servo drives can record current, speed, position,
following error, bus voltage, and fault bits around
an event.
drive-trace.wrapped_original_text:
Drive Trace
Servo drives can record current, speed, position, following error, bus voltage, and fault bits around an event.

alarm-taxonomy.wrapped_text:
Alarm Taxonomy
Good alarm systems distinguish limit hit, following
error, encoder loss, overtravel, overcurrent,
overtemperature, and safety circuit open.
alarm-taxonomy.wrapped_original_text:
Alarm Taxonomy
Good alarm systems distinguish limit hit, following error, encoder loss, overtravel, overcurrent, overtemperature, and safety circuit open.

commissioning-data.wrapped_text:
Commissioning Data
Capture motor parameters, I/O maps, homing results,
tune files, firmware versions, and safety validation
evidence before production use.
commissioning-data.wrapped_original_text:
Commissioning Data
Capture motor parameters, I/O maps, homing results, tune files, firmware versions, and safety validation evidence before production use.

metrology-feedback.wrapped_text:
Metrology Feedback
Metrology closes the loop around machine
truth, not just motor truth.
metrology-feedback.wrapped_original_text:
Metrology Feedback
Metrology closes the loop around machine truth, not just motor truth.

glass-scales.wrapped_text:
Glass Scales
Linear glass scales can correct screw pitch
error, thermal drift, and mechanical compliance
when integrated into the control loop.
glass-scales.wrapped_original_text:
Glass Scales
Linear glass scales can correct screw pitch error, thermal drift, and mechanical compliance when integrated into the control loop.

thermal-compensation.wrapped_text:
Thermal Compensation
Machine tools compensate spindle growth, ball screw
heating, frame expansion, and process temperature
when precision demands it.
thermal-compensation.wrapped_original_text:
Thermal Compensation
Machine tools compensate spindle growth, ball screw heating, frame expansion, and process temperature when precision demands it.

probe-compensation.wrapped_text:
Probe Compensation
Probing can update work offsets, detect fixture
error, inspect features, and adapt machining to real
stock position.
probe-compensation.wrapped_original_text:
Probe Compensation
Probing can update work offsets, detect fixture error, inspect features, and adapt machining to real stock position.

cross-industry-patterns.wrapped_text:
Cross-Industry Patterns
Different CNC industries reuse the same
electronics patterns with different dominant
risks.
cross-industry-patterns.wrapped_original_text:
Cross-Industry Patterns
Different CNC industries reuse the same electronics patterns with different dominant risks.

milling-turning.wrapped_text:
Milling And Turning
Prioritize spindle synchronization, tool changer
interlocks, rigid tapping, coolant control, and high
stiffness servo axes.
milling-turning.wrapped_original_text:
Milling And Turning
Prioritize spindle synchronization, tool changer interlocks, rigid tapping, coolant control, and high stiffness servo axes.

grinding.wrapped_text:
Grinding
Prioritizes thermal stability, high-resolution
feedback, wheel dressing, vibration control, and
extremely repeatable infeed.
grinding.wrapped_original_text:
Grinding
Prioritizes thermal stability, high-resolution feedback, wheel dressing, vibration control, and extremely repeatable infeed.

plasma-laser.wrapped_text:
Plasma And Laser
Prioritize torch or laser enable safety, arc-ok or
beam-ready signals, height control, EMI management,
and fire risk controls.
plasma-laser.wrapped_original_text:
Plasma And Laser
Prioritize torch or laser enable safety, arc-ok or beam-ready signals, height control, EMI management, and fire risk controls.

waterjet.wrapped_text:
Waterjet
Prioritizes pump pressure, abrasive feed, pierce
sequencing, water management, and safety around
high-pressure energy.
waterjet.wrapped_original_text:
Waterjet
Prioritizes pump pressure, abrasive feed, pierce sequencing, water management, and safety around high-pressure energy.

additive-robotics.wrapped_text:
Additive And Robotics
Prioritize coordinated process energy, multi-axis
kinematics, collision zones, sensor fusion, and safe
human interaction.
additive-robotics.wrapped_original_text:
Additive And Robotics
Prioritize coordinated process energy, multi-axis kinematics, collision zones, sensor fusion, and safe human interaction.

upgrade-path.wrapped_text:
Upgrade Path
The example FluidNC machine can teach core CNC
electronics, while the industrial upgrade path
replaces step/dir timing with fieldbus drives,
rated safety, and richer feedback.
upgrade-path.wrapped_original_text:
Upgrade Path
The example FluidNC machine can teach core CNC electronics, while the industrial upgrade path replaces step/dir timing with fieldbus drives, rated safety, and richer feedback.

better-stepper-cabinet.wrapped_text:
Better Stepper Cabinet
First improve wiring, shielding, alarm capture,
homing, documentation, and power distribution before
changing the control architecture.
better-stepper-cabinet.wrapped_original_text:
Better Stepper Cabinet
First improve wiring, shielding, alarm capture, homing, documentation, and power distribution before changing the control architecture.

servo-conversion.wrapped_text:
Servo Conversion
A servo upgrade changes motor sizing, inertia
matching, tuning, braking, fault handling, and often
mechanical expectations.

fieldbus-conversion.wrapped_text:
Fieldbus Conversion
A fieldbus upgrade moves command, feedback,
diagnostics, and drive state into a
deterministic network and usually changes the
controller class.

safety-upgrade.wrapped_text:
Safety Upgrade
A safety upgrade adds risk assessment, safety relay
or safety PLC, STO wiring, guard interlocks,
validation, and documented reset behavior.
